zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna de Legh於大約1250年出生在英國時，她的父親Lord Richard de Legh31歲，母親Margery De Holgrove26歲。她於1278年之前與William de Venables II在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1295年之前在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna de Legh于大约1250年出生在英国时，她的父亲Lord Richard de Legh31岁，母亲Margery De Holgrove26岁。她于1278年之前与William de Venables II在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1295年之前在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna de Legh was born about 1250, in England, her father, Lord Richard de Legh, was 31 and her mother, Margery De Holgrove, was 26. She married William de Venables II before 1278, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 1295, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna de Legh est née environ 1250, à Angleterre, son père, Lord Richard de Legh, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margery De Holgrove, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé William de Venables II avant 1278, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 1295, dans sa ville natale.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna de Leghが約1250年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Lord Richard de Leghは31歳，母Margery De Holgroveは26歳であった。1278年以前にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでWilliam de Venables IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1295年以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna de Legh(이)가 대략 1250년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Richard de Legh(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery De Holgrove(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1278년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 William de Venables II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1295년 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna de Legh nasceu aproximadamente 1250, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Richard de Legh, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margery De Holgrove, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Venables II antes 1278, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 1295, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna de Legh родилась около 1250 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Lord Richard de Legh было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margery De Holgrove, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Venables II перед 1278 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 1295 г. в её родном городе.
